title: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description: Pay [red]50[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. At the start of the next combat, Upgrade your starting hand.

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description: Pay [red]150[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. At the start of the next 5 combats, gain 2 Strength.

options.title: Tea of Discourtesy
options.description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle 2 Dazed into your Draw Pile.

conditions: All players must have at least 150 Gold
notes: Each tea choice grants a corresponding event relic with unique effects. Bone Tea and Ember Tea lead to a peaceful ending where the tea master completes the tea ceremony. Tea of Discourtesy leads to an angry confrontation, with the tea master insulted by your refusal and presenting an ugly cup instead. The event appears in all four acts, but spawn is restricted to Acts 1 and 2 only, and requires all players in the party to have at least 150 Gold.
